\tzpentry{ID4479}{Threshold Quantum Propagator Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4479 introduces Threshold Quantum Propagator Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:phi-threshold} \Phi_{\mathrm{crit}} \;:=\; \sqrt{\frac{\hbar c^{3}}{G e^{2}}} \,\alpha_{\mathrm{EM}}\,, \end{equation}
